objective_statement: Explain the concepts of network communication
Describe common networking models and protocols (OSI and TCP/IP)
Explain the use of ports and protocols
Identify IPv4 address types and their uses in a network
Identify IPv6 address types and their uses in a network
Calculate and verify subnet masks and address prefixes
Identify common endpoint devices and their network characteristics
Identify common network media types and their characteristics
Identify common types of network infrastructure and their attributes
Describe common network device characteristics and features (switches routers APs)
Use a systematic methodology to diagnose network problems
Demonstrate effective use of network diagnostic tools and commands
Describe security concepts and mechanisms applied to networks
Identify common network threats and mitigation techniques
